# NYC Restaurant Inspection Analysis

## Introduction





## Data
### Description





```{r}

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

df <- read_csv("data/nyc_restaurant_sample.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

head(df)

```

### Missing value analysis

#### Missing Values by Variable





```{r}

missing_count <- data.frame(variable = names(df), missing = colSums(is.na(df)))

ggplot(missing_count, aes(x = reorder(variable, missing), y = missing)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Missing Values by Variable", x = "Variable", y = "Number of Missing Values") +
  theme_minimal()

```
#### Missing Values by Borough





```{r}

df %>%
  mutate(score_missing = is.na(SCORE)) %>%
  count(BORO, score_missing) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = BORO, y = n, fill = score_missing)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill") +
  labs(title = "Missing Score by Borough", y = "Proportion", fill = "Missing") +
  theme_minimal()

```
#### Missing Grade by Inspection Type






```{r}

df %>%
  mutate(grade_missing = is.na(GRADE)) %>%
  count(`INSPECTION TYPE`, grade_missing) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = `INSPECTION TYPE`, y = n, fill = grade_missing)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal()

```

## Results

### Question 1: 

```{r}



```

### Question 2: 

```{r}



```
### Question 3: 

```{r}



```
## Conclusion
